subject: A large grey-skinned humanoid figure with tusks and chains, wielding a flaming torch and holding a skull, in a burning city background
description: A massive figure with grey skin, visible tusks, and a muscular frame dominates the foreground, arms spread wide in an aggressive posture. In one hand the figure grips a handle attached to a chain; in the other, a crumbling skull. A flaming torch or burning flag blazes above and behind. The figure wears a spiked belt and a tattered red-and-black loincloth. Behind and below stretches a dark cityscape silhouetted against a fiery orange sky. The figure's expression is mouth-open, rage-filled. This is clearly a Rakdos performer or muscle: the chains, skull, fire, and aggressive stance are all visually present.
foreground: large grey-skinned humanoid with tusks, chain, skull, and burning torch aloft
background: dark city silhouette against fiery orange sky
